sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102608" key="tau=ta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταῦτα</orth>, neut. pl. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὗτος</foreign>: but <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταὐτά</orth>, crasis for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ αὐτά</foreign>.</entryFree>
